Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-17 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Dashboard Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which claims the #1 ranking with a composite score of 97.6 out of 100—driven by a staggering 861.29% one-year return and consistent ratio strength across all timeframes (4 out of 4 ratio passes). The ticker significantly outpaces broad indices, with a 839.98% edge over SPY and a 793.64% edge over IAU over the same period, while maintaining all four SMA gates (30/50/100/200 day) and a clean momentum signal with normal volatility. TYRA ranks second with a still-impressive 97.5+ implied score, posting a 244.37% one-year return and 195.41% six-month return, also passing all ratio and SMA filters, though its outperformance versus SPY (223.05% over one year) is more modest than TNGX's. Both securities show healthy resilience on bad SPY days (1.32+ scores) and minimal correlation to major sector ETFs, suggesting they are driving momentum through fundamentals rather than broad market beta—a pattern consistent with strong short-term momentum characteristics across both names.
